entries.source: "Is social media harmful?"
entries.value: "An bhfuil na meáin shóisialta díobhálach?"

entries.source: "Is space exploration worth it?"
entries.value: "An fiú taiscéalaíocht spáis í?"

entries.source: "Should homework exist?"
entries.value: "Ar cheart obair bhaile a bheith ann?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate any topic on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Treoir phraiticiúil ar Debate any topic a úsáid ar inspir le haghaidh foghlaim argóna, le prasaí, lúba staidéir, agus nósanna IS níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lúb staidéir níos láidre

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Cóitseálaí Díospóireachta IS le hArgóintí Níos Géire chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: roghnaigh ábhar ar bith agus tabhair aghaidh ar dhíospóireacht cheart. Roghnaigh taobh, glac dúshlán, agus foghlaim argóintí níos fearr a dhéanamh.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: practical guide
entries.value: Cóitseálaí Díospóireachta IS le hArgóintí Níos Géire: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Answer counterarguments.
entries.value: Freagair frithargóintí.

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argóint

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Choose a side.
entries.value: Roghnaigh taobh.

entries.source: Debate any topic
entries.value: Déan díospóireacht ar ábhar ar bith

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh trí an smaoineamh a scríobh ar ais ó chuimhne.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate any topic. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Explain My Answer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Tosaigh an mód beo ag Debate any topic. Más mian leat formáid foghlama chomharsanachta, bain triail as Explain My Answer. Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar an ardán, léigh cad ba chóir do chompánach foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: Neartaigh maímh laga.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Mic léinn, díospóirí, scríbhneoirí agus foghlaimeoirí fiosracha atá ag iarraidh réasúnaíocht níos láidre.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Inis don mhód cad atá tú ag iarraidh a fhoghlaim nó a tháirgeadh.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Taispeánann an difríocht sin í féin sa sreabhadh. In ionad freagra ollmhór amháin, bogann na seisiúin is fearr trí lúb: socraigh sprioc, bain triail as rud éigin, faigh aiseolas, deisigh an pointe lag, agus roghnaigh an chéad ghníomh eile.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Tá an fócas sin tábhachtach. Is féidir le chatbot ginearálta beagnach aon rud a fhreagairt, ach tugann mód foghlama cruth don chomhrá. Spreagann sé thú i dtreo an chineáil smaointeoireachta, cleachtaidh, aiseolais, nó fiosraithe a chabhraíonn leis an smaoineamh fanacht.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Cuireann an cóitseálaí frithargóint láidir amháin chun cinn ag an am agus rianaíonn sé na maímh atá tábhachtach.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Is é seo an nós céanna taobh thiar de staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Is úsáidí IS nuair a thugann sí aiseolas ar do smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Tá an mód seo thar a bheith úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoirí ar mian leo:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim i d’fhocail féin.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate any topic nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Cad leis a gcabhraíonn an mód seo

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Cá háit le dul ina dhiaidh sin

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.
